description.zh: Java序列化和反序列化的基本概念，通过简单实验理解对象与字节流的转换过程。
description.en: Basic concepts of Java serialization and deserialization, understanding object and byte stream conversion through simple experiments.

content.zh: 序列化将对象转化为字节流，便于保存；反序列化将字节流还原为对象。
content.en: Serialization converts objects to byte streams for storage; deserialization converts byte streams back to objects.
Define People class implementing Serializable interface:

content.zh: 序列化数据写入People.txt，使用xxd查看二进制内容
content.en: Serialized data written to People.txt, view binary content with xxd

codeBlocks.code:
file People.txt
People.txt: Java serialization data, version 5

xxd People.txt
00000000: aced 0005 7372 0006 5065 6f70 6c65 4499  ....sr..PeopleD.

content.zh: 反序列化攻击原理：重写readObject方法执行恶意代码
content.en: Deserialization attack principle: Override readObject method to execute malicious code

content.zh: 反序列化RCE的POC传入参数可控，通过构造恶意序列化数据触发代码执行。
content.en: Deserialization RCE POC requires controllable parameters, trigger code execution via malicious serialized data.
